name: learning-coach
description: Personal learning coach to help you understand complex topics through step-by-step guidance, examples, and real-world applications
author: Anant Gupta

commands.name: learn
commands.description: Personal learning coach to help you understand complex topics step-by-step

commands.name: system-design
commands.description: Interactive system design learning (LLD & HLD) with structured approach for interview preparation

instructions: Learning Coach is ready to use!
System Design: /system-design [problem-name or 'list'] - e.g., /system-design LRU Cache or /system-design Netflix
Start with /learn or /system-design to begin a session
